info.title: Private Payments API
info.description: Generate a challenge string for a wallet to sign as part of the Private Ephemeral Rollup login flow.

get.description: Returns a challenge string that the wallet must sign. The signature is then submitted to `/v1/spl/login` in exchange for a bearer token used to read private data.

parameters.name: pubkey
parameters.description: The public key of the wallet that will read private data.

parameters.name: cluster
parameters.description: Optional. Use `mainnet` for BASE_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_RPC_URL, `devnet` for BASE_DEVNET_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_DEVNET_RPC_URL, or provide a custom http(s) RPC URL to override the base RPC while keeping the configured ephemeral RPC.

parameters.name: mock
parameters.description: Optional. When `true`, the API uses a mock challenge for testing. Defaults to `false`.

challenge.description: The challenge string generated by the Private Ephemeral Rollup.
